<!--
Thanks for contributing to GeoPulse! Please fill out the sections below.
Keep PRs focused on a single logical change.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Delete if none. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Backend: `pytest services/tests` passes (if backend changed).
- [ ] Frontend: `npm --prefix frontend run typecheck` and `run build` pass (if frontend changed).
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots for UI changes. -->
